product_overview: QSMS Rework Management System is a single-page dashboard for authenticated users to create, review, and manage rework cases. It supports item lookup, case creation with images, case updates, and overview analytics for tracking rework status.
core_goals: Sign in to access the rework management workspace based on user role
Create new rework cases with item details, quantities, reasons, and supporting images
Look up item master data and save new item metadata when needed
View, filter, edit, and delete existing rework cases
Review dashboard metrics and analyze rework trends

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users so they can access the rework management dashboard according to their role.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See the authenticated dashboard
Navigate to / -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See an error message

features.name: Create Rework Case
features.description: Create a new rework case with source, item details, reason information, responsible party, and optional image evidence.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the case creation tab -> Select case source -> Enter item number and check existing master data -> Enter item name, code, amount, reason, and responsible party -> Upload images for the item -> Submit the new case -> See a success notification

Navigate to / -> Open the case creation tab -> Select case source -> Enter item number and check existing master data -> Enter item name, code, amount, reason, and responsible party -> Upload images for the item -> Submit the new case -> See an error notification for invalid input

features.name: Item Master Lookup
features.description: Check whether an item exists in the item master and save new item metadata when it is not found.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the case creation tab -> Enter item number -> Check the item master -> See the matched item name or a not-found result
Navigate to / -> Open the case creation tab -> Enter item number -> Check the item master -> Confirm saving the new item metadata -> See the item stored in the master data

features.name: View and Manage Cases
features.description: Review all existing cases in the overall list, open a case for editing, update details, or delete a case.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the overall cases tab -> View case list and dashboard metrics -> Open a case edit modal -> Update case details -> Save the changes -> See the updated case in the list
Navigate to / -> Open the overall cases tab -> View case list and dashboard metrics -> Open a case detail for deletion -> Delete the case -> See the case removed from the list

routes.description: Main app shell and authenticated dashboard with tabbed case management

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate user with PIN/username via Google Apps Script backend
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Create Rework Case
features.description: Record a new rework case with item details, optional image uploads, and source metadata.
user_interactions: Enter item number and check existing master data
Enter item name, code, amount, reason, and responsible party

features.name: View and Manage Cases
features.description: Load, review, edit, and delete existing rework cases within the dashboard.
user_interactions: View case list and dashboard metrics

features.name: Item Master Lookup
features.description: Auto-fill item name from master data and optionally persist new item metadata in the item master.
user_interactions: Confirm saving new item when not found

known_limitations.issue: App uses a single-page tabbed UI without explicit router routes
known_limitations.impact: Tests should treat the app as a single route with internal tab navigation

known_limitations.issue: Backend depends on REACT_APP_GAS_WEB_APP_URL and Google Apps Script CORS support
known_limitations.impact: E2E tests may fail if GAS URL is not configured or backend does not allow CORS

known_limitations.issue: Login flow requires GAS backend credentials and valid test account
known_limitations.impact: Automated tests need valid PIN/profile values for authentication
